name: Chicago National BankCard
description_short: National Bankcard provides merchant payment processing solutions including POS systems, card terminals, and online payment acceptance for businesses of all sizes.
description_long:
National Bankcard is a merchant services provider that specializes in payment processing solutions for retail, restaurant, mobile, and e-commerce businesses. The company positions itself as an alternative to Square and Stripe, targeting merchants who want transparent pricing and equipment support.

The company offers multiple payment acceptance methods: Clover POS systems (Station, Mini, and Flex models), traditional credit card terminals, mobile tap-to-pay capability via smartphone, and online payment processing with invoice and recurring billing features. All hardware placements are advertised as free, ranging from $299 to $1,499 in stated equipment value. They emphasize their Cash Discount Program, which allows merchants to pass credit card processing fees to customers rather than absorbing them, potentially reducing processing costs to 0%.

National Bankcard differentiates itself through several claimed advantages: 24/7 live phone support (versus competitors' limited support), same-day setup with next-day payments, no setup fees, no cancellation fees, access to Clover's 200+ app marketplace, and tiered/interchange pricing transparency. The company serves over 75,000 merchants and maintains a 4.9/5 rating on TrustPilot with 9,640 reviews.

As a merchant services provider, National Bankcard operates outside traditional consumer finance categories. Their business model depends on merchant adoption and processing volume. The prominent emphasis on competitive comparisons with Square and Stripe suggests a competitive market position. Customer reviews are notably positive, though the cash discount model requires merchants to modify their customer-facing pricing, which not all business types may find appropriate.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free equipment placement for Clover POS systems (valued at $299-$1,499) with no setup or cancellation fees
24/7 live phone support, compared to competitors' limited support availability
Cash Discount Program allowing merchants to charge customers for credit card processing, potentially reducing costs to 0%
Same-day setup with next-day payment processing
Access to Clover App Market with 200+ business apps including payroll, inventory, and loyalty tools
Transparent pricing with tiered and interchange rate options
Serves 75,000+ merchants with 4.9/5 TrustPilot rating (9,640 reviews)
cons: Cash Discount Program requires merchants to visibly charge customers for card payments, which may deter some customer segments or be inappropriate for certain industries
Limited information on actual processing rates and pricing; comparison calculator uses Square's 2.60% + $0.10 baseline, not National Bankcard's actual rates
No information on contract terms, early termination conditions, or long-term pricing stability despite claiming no cancellation fees
Heavy sales-driven model (preferred contact is phone call to 1-855-362-0152) may create friction for self-service comparison
Clover dependency means merchants are locked into that ecosystem for app and feature ecosystem
best_for: Retail businesses and restaurants seeking transparent pricing without hidden fees
Merchants comfortable with cash discount pricing models who want to offset processing costs
Small-to-medium businesses valuing 24/7 phone support and equipment placement
Multi-location retailers needing unified POS and payment processing
diagnosis: National Bankcard is designed for business owners seeking merchant payment processing with transparent pricing, equipment support, and strong customer service. The main caveat is that their flagship Cash Discount Program requires merchants to charge customers directly for card processing, which fundamentally changes pricing psychology and may not suit all business models or customer bases.
services: Clover Station POS system (enterprise-level with 2 HD displays, drawer, printer)
Clover Mini POS device (compact full POS with built-in printer and barcode scanner)
Clover Flex handheld POS terminal with mobile functionality
Credit card terminals (wireless and WiFi options, chip/Apple Pay compatible)
Tap-to-Pay mobile payment via smartphone (Apple Pay and Google Pay)
Online payment processing with invoice and recurring billing
Free equipment placement and same-day setup
Access to 200+ Clover App Marketplace applications
Merchant services consultation and pricing review
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 6957 W North Ave #201, Oak Park, IL 60302
meta_description: Merchant payment processing solutions including POS systems and card terminals for businesses of all sizes.
